commit_version: If you change the version number, you should only change the 4th digit. The first three digits are controlled by the SDK, and checked in SDK's code.

baseConfig.comment_runMode: if run in async model, 0 - sync, 1 - async
baseConfig.comment_downscale: downscale ratio on input image. valid values: 1, 2, 4
baseConfig.comment_inverTone: 0: disable inverseTone，for input without toneMapping 1: enable inverseTone，for input with toneMapping, 0 for mtk, 1 for qcom

gyroConfig.comment_gyro: phoneMotionMode, take gyro data from gyrot0 seconds to gyrot1 before current frame
gyroConfig.comment_avgGyroNum: num of frame to calculate phone mode
gyroConfig.comment_gyroNumPerSecond: input max num of gyro per second, eg: preview max 30fps, process 1 frame per 4 frames, every time 40 gyro, the gyroNumPerSecond is 30fps/4*40 = 300
gyroConfig.comment_tripodThresh: gyro threshold to classify tripod and handle
gyroConfig.comment_focalLength_gyro: calibration data for specific device, do not change once calibrated

aligningConfig.comment_method: 1 - align_off; 2 - lk optical flow; 3 - gyro intergeral; 4 - gyro divided; 5 - gyro rolling shutter; 6 - gyro calibrate lk

meteringConfig.comment_method: 0 - global align and local dis; 1 - global align and local diff; 2 - local diff; 3 - bounded flow; 4 - global align and bounded flow; 5 - motion capture
meteringConfig.comment_blockWeight: weight of each block to calculate global move value.
meteringConfig.comment_smoothFactor: smooth current motion and previous motion
meteringConfig.comment_mdLocalTh: threshold to classify current loacal motion
meteringConfig.coment_mdGlobalTh: threshold to classify current global motion
meteringConfig.comment_mdConfirmTh: threshold to finally judgement wheather obj moves
meteringConfig.comment_motionClassifyThresh: threshold to classify motion, this param should match skip frame number
meteringConfig.comment_motionSmoothRate: the rate of smoothing the current motion and previous motion, in (0.0, 1.0). 1.0 means totally depending on current motion
meteringConfig.comment_motionPercent: select strongest percent grid to classify motion mode
meteringConfig.comment_lowLight: combine gyro and motion low light point
meteringConfig.comment_highLight: combine gyro and motion high light point
meteringConfig.comment_gyroMag: gyro coefficient to match motion in magnitude
meteringConfig.comment_totalMvStatMethod: method of calculating local Mv, 0: average, 1: percentage
meteringConfig.comment_localMvStatMethod: method of calculating local Mv, 0: average, 1: percentage
meteringConfig.comment_bodyMvMag: local mv mag for human body attention areas

MVThresh.comment_globalMvLevelThresh: Level threshold of global motion - homogarphy
MVThresh.comment_totalMvLevelThresh: Level threshold of local motion average
MVThresh.comment_localMvLevelThresh: motion threshold of local motion for motion statistic
MVThresh.comment_bodyMvLevelThresh: level threshold of local motion in body area

predictConfig.comment_method: 0: equal current frame motion 1:mean of previous avgFrameNum frame motion 2:GMM(Gaussian Mixture Mode), 3: kalman filter
predictConfig.comment_avgFrameNum: num of frame in mean method(pmmPredictMethod=1) to predict motion
predictConfig.comment_iterConvergence: num of iteration in GMM method(pmmPredictMethod=2) to predict motion, in [250,1000]
predictConfig.comment_gmmClusterNum: num of cluster in GMM method(pmmPredictMethod=2) to predict motion, max value is 3
predictConfig.comment_gmmFrameNum: num of frame in GMM method(pmmPredictMethod=2) to predict motion
predictConfig.comment_gmmConf: confidence to get one clear frame at least in next gmmKFrameK frame in GMM method
predictConfig.comment_gmmKFrame: num of capturing frame for using
predictConfig.comment_kalmanQ_kalmanR: kalman predict param Q and R
